title: Default SQL warehouse settings (General Availability)
body: Default SQL warehouse settings are now generally available. Workspace administrators can set a default SQL warehouse that is automatically selected in SQL authoring surfaces, including the SQL editor, AI/BI dashboards, Genie spaces, Alerts, and Catalog Explorer. Individual users can also override the workspace default by setting their own user-level default warehouse. See [Set a default SQL warehouse for the workspace](/aws/en/admin/sql#default-warehouse) and [Set a user-level default warehouse](/aws/en/compute/sql-warehouse/create#user-default).

ref_links.text: Set a default SQL warehouse for the workspace
